vocab.meaning: cách tiếp cận sức khỏe một cách toàn diện
vocab.example: I adopt a holistic approach to health, ensuring that my emotional well-being is prioritized alongside physical fitness.
Consuming a variety of fermented foods and citrus fruits helps to fortify the immune system against seasonal ailments.

vocab.meaning: hoạt động thể chất cường độ cao/vất vả
vocab.example: I usually engage in strenuous physical activity, such as high-intensity interval training, at least three times a week.

vocab.meaning: sự thiếu hụt về dinh dưỡng
vocab.example: I undergo regular blood tests to identify any nutritional deficiencies and adjust my diet accordingly.

vocab.meaning: khả năng phục hồi/sức chịu đựng của cơ thể
vocab.example: Cold showers and heat saunas are part of my routine to build physiological resilience and improve circulation.

vocab.meaning: duy trì sức sống/sự sung sức
vocab.example: Staying hydrated and getting adequate electrolytes is essential to sustain vitality during long working hours.
I’ve found that short power naps are incredibly effective to combat fatigue and sharpen my mental focus.

vocab.meaning: thành phần cơ thể (tỷ lệ cơ, mỡ, xương...)
vocab.example: Rather than just focusing on weight, I pay close attention to my body composition to ensure I am gaining muscle mass.

vocab.meaning: nguyên liệu chưa qua chế biến
vocab.example: I make an effort to cook most of my meals from scratch using fresh, unprocessed ingredients to avoid hidden sugars.

vocab.meaning: sự cân chỉnh tư thế (dáng đứng, ngồi)
vocab.example: Working at a desk all day can be damaging, so I do specific stretches to maintain proper postural alignment.
